description: Genuine coupled two-site intra-file bug-fix tasks: one feature broken in two coupled spots within a SINGLE source file (a module-level declaration the target function depends on, plus the function body itself), one test file. Fixing either site alone leaves the test red — both must change. Measures whether the harness can coordinate a multi-site fix within one locked target file (no multi-file coordination required, unlike SMALLCODE_TARGET_SET multifile suites).
